title: Steel and Impure Gold (S.A.I.G)
description: This mod adds 2 new materials: steel and impure gold, which can be used to make and upgrade tools/armor
body:
This mod adds 2 new materials: steel and impure gold

Steel is found by mining, it is about as rare as gold

Impure gold is crafted like (G=Gold Ingot, I=Iron Nugget)

[I]  [I]  [I]

[I] [G] [I]

[I]  [I]  [I]

Impure gold can be used to upgrade gold armour and tools, using a smithing table [Gold Tool/Armour] + [Impure Gold] > [Impure Gold Tool/Armour]

Additionally you can make Impure gold rods, with the recipe (I=Impure Gold)

[ ] [I]

[ ] [I]

They are used to make the Master's Sword! It is crafted like a sword: (I=Impure Gold Rod S=Steel)

[] [S] []

[] [S] []

[]  [I]  []
